name: Spinach Salad (Satterly)
recipeIngredient: 1 large Seedless orange, peeled and roughly chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place spinach in a large salad bowl.
2. Add orange, mushrooms, and onions to the spinach.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper until well combined.
4. Pour the dressing over the salad and add toasted slivered almonds.
5. Gently toss the salad to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
